generatedFor: 51 public YouTube support channels / 54 support-language variants
routingRules: A public support channel is assigned to exactly one YouTube API project route.
Regional support variants stay attached to their shared public channel: EN/EN-GB -> en, ES/ES-419 -> es, PT/PT-BR -> pt.
Do not put OAuth token JSON, client secret JSON, refresh tokens, or .local files in this config.
Each real Google Cloud / YouTube API project must have its own GitHub environment secret bundle before live uploads use that route.
This file is a local routing contract only; creating Google Cloud projects, OAuth clients, production status, quota extension requests, and GitHub secrets are external steps.

projects.label: youtube 1
notes: Existing first project route. It currently maps to the already-used GitHub environment until a renamed production environment is introduced.
Contains the highest-priority shared channels first: EN/EN-GB, ES/ES-419, PT/PT-BR, plus RU and major audience channels.
